name: projects_hmac_keys
description: Manage projects hmackeys — creates a new hmac key for the specified service account, updates the state of an hmac key. see the [hmac key resource descriptor](https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/json_api/v1/projects/hmackeys/update#request-body) for valid states, retrieves a list of hmac keys matching the criteria. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project ID owning the service account.

parameters.name: serviceAccountEmail
parameters.description: Email address of the service account.

parameters.name: userProject
parameters.description: The project to be billed for this request.
